subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou knowest that my sole aim in revealing Thy Cause hath been to reveal Thee and not my self
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تعلم بانی ما اردت فی امرک نفسی بل نفسک و لا اظهار شانی بل اظهار
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @love of God
